summary: Production Hardening Pass Backend Testing Complete - All 27 tests passed (100%). Verified XSS protection on share page HTML, error sanitization across all endpoints, validation errors return 422 (not raw exceptions), 'Video unavailable' fallback for missing video_uri, and all core API endpoints functioning correctly.

ERROR SANITIZATION VERIFIED: All endpoints return friendly error messages, no raw Python tracebacks or str(e) content exposed
VIDEO UNAVAILABLE FALLBACK VERIFIED: Missing video_uri shows 'Video unavailable' div instead of broken video player
VALIDATION ERRORS VERIFIED: voice-studio/process, voice-studio/demo-reel, acting-coach/analyze all return 422 with Pydantic validation errors (not raw exceptions)
